reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [If p->lc is NULL, calling search(p->lc) leads to dereferencing NULL pointer in the next recursive call, causing runtime crash. Similarly for p->rc.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Dereferencing NULL pointer when p->rc is NULL, leading to runtime crash; should check for NULL before recursive call]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Same issue: when p->rc is NULL, search(NULL) will crash when accessing p->lc or p->rc inside.]

51.reason: [Resetting k to 1 after each insertion breaks height tracking. Height should be passed as a parameter during recursion, not tracked via global variable.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Resetting k to 1 after each insertion breaks height tracking. Height should be passed as a parameter during recursion, not tracked via global variable.]
